creator: me@svmhdvn.name
text:
Created attachment 258896
[PATCH] devel/glade: fix missing USE_GNOME=libxml2

> Package needs xsltproc from textproc/libxslt to configure and build, but this dependency is not listed.

This is now a stale bug as this dependency has been added to the port. Also, I'm attaching a patch to fix an error found with `poudriere testport` (stage-qa) about a missing USE_GNOME=libxml2.

After merging this patch, this bug can be closed as fixed.
